channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: World of Hyatt Offers 20% Discount on Points Purchases Through April 7, 2026
item.description: World of Hyatt has launched a limited-time promotion offering a 20% discount on purchased points, reducing the cost to 2.08 cents per point. The offer is valid for transactions made between February 1...

item.title: Ukraine’s Former Energy Minister Detained Over Alleged $100M Corruption Scheme
item.description: Ukraine’s National Anti-Corruption Bureau (NABU) has detained former Energy Minister German Galushchenko while he was attempting to leave the country. Galushchenko resigned in November 2025 amid a maj...

item.title: Targeted Capital One Offer Provides 5,000 Bonus Miles for $200+ CardCash Gift Card Purchases
item.description: Capital One has introduced a targeted promotion through its Capital One Offers shopping portal that allows eligible cardholders to earn 5,000 bonus miles when they spend at least $200 on gift cards fr...

item.title: Bank of America to Reduce Preferred Rewards Bonuses and Adjust Eligibility Tiers
item.description: Bank of America has announced upcoming changes to its Preferred Rewards program, rebranding it as 'BofA Rewards' starting in May 2026. The program will see a reduction in status tiers from four to thr...

item.title: Targeted Delta Platinum Amex Promotion Offers Double MQDs on Spending Through May 17, 2026

item.title: Impact of U.S. Hardline Immigration and Cuba Policies on Cuban-American Families
item.description: Recent U.S. policies targeting Cuba and stricter immigration enforcement are creating unexpected consequences for Cuban-American communities, particularly in Florida. Former President Donald Trump’s h...

item.title: Comparing Fine Hotels + Resorts® and The Edit by Chase Travel℠: Benefits and Differences
item.description: This article explores the key differences and similarities between two premium hotel programs: Fine Hotels + Resorts®, offered by American Express, and The Edit by Chase Travel℠, offered by Chase. Bot...

item.title: Choice Privileges Offers Up to 30% Discount on Points Purchases
item.description: Choice Privileges has launched a limited-time points sale offering discounts of up to 30% for members of its rewards program. Purchases of 8,000 to 17,000 points receive a 25% discount, while purchase...

item.title: Former Pro-Trump Navy Veteran Announces Break with MAGA Following Epstein Document Release
item.description: A self-described disabled U.S. Navy veteran known on X as AdamTheAngler (@AdamtheGreatTV) announced that he is ending his long-standing support for the MAGA movement following the February 2026 releas...

item.title: Marbella as a Hub for Espionage, Arms Trade, and Elite Excess in the 1970s-80s

item.title: How to Choose Small Standing Desks for Efficient Home Workspaces
